title: styloglossum lyroglossum
intro: Styloglossum lyroglossum, also known as the tongue-like tongue orchid, is a rare and exotic orchid species found in the tropical regions of the Western Ghats in India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Styloglossum lyroglossum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory issues. Styloglossum lyroglossum is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
